wisdom. Sir William
Hamilton was born while Gemini was rising; the Sun (11) Leo,
Venus (29) Leo, Mercury-Virgo (1), Mars (3) Saturn (12) and
Uranus (18) all in Libra, Jupiter (26) and Neptune (26) in
Scorpio, and Moon in Sagittarius at the beginning. This is a
very good example of the principle we are formulating here.
Hamilton was in advance of his age, and knowledge to him
was only a clarification or refinement of the existing materi
als. But when this distance is less than fourteen degrees, we
have the deliberate self-conscious mind. Woodrow Wilson is
our supreme example. Richard Burton, Freud, Pope Pius XI,
and Wilson were all self-conciously concerned with the cul
tural roots of humanity and they proceeded with their sen
sitve ideals.
